name: Atlanta Metro Transport Svc
fmcsa_address: Hampton, GA (per directory listings; SAFER snapshot inactive)
registry_source: Georgia Secretary of State eCorp (search not directly accessible via WebFetch; 403)
notes: FMCSA SAFER snapshot for USDOT 3902769 returns 'INACTIVE in the SAFER database' so power units/drivers/operation/address not available. USDOT 3902769 and MC-1438282 referenced via brokersnapshot/truckingdatabase third-party mirrors. Yelp/Manta indicate ATL Metro Transport Services Inc, Hampton GA, est. ~2016, non-emergency medical transport (NEMT) — not a traditional school-bus operator; possible mismatch with Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis. GA SOS direct lookup blocked (403) via WebFetch.

name: Dousman Transport Co
inc_date: June 1962 (founded; exact WI DFI registration date not retrieved)
officers: Robert W. Southcott (founder); current terminal manager Virginia (Ginger) Boomfield at Waterford
entity_status: active (per WI DFI public records system; not directly retrieved)
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records (apps.dfi.wi.gov) — direct search not retrieved; founding date confirmed via Dousman Transport corporate history
notes: SAFER snapshot matches legal name and HQ; Waterford 515 Elizabeth St is a terminal location. Safety rating rated 06/11/2013. MCS-150 dated 02/24/2025; 4.54M reported miles in 2024. Founded June 1962 by Robert W. Southcott after acquiring Ortmann family bus assets (started late 1940s).

name: Johnson School Bus Svc
carrier_operation: Interstate; private passenger (non-business) classification per SAFER (note: contract school transportation)
fmcsa_address: N87 W17391 Main Street, Menomonee Falls, WI 53051 (mailing: PO Box 285, West Bend, WI 53095)
inc_date: August 1942 (founded by Aaron W. Johnson; exact WI DFI corporate registration date not retrieved)
officers: Aaron W. Johnson (founder); subsequent leaders: Chuck Johnson, Dianne Johnson, Steve Johnson, Dan Johnson, Judy Holzmann
entity_status: active (company subsequently sold to Landmark Student Transportation, Canadian-based)
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records (apps.dfi.wi.gov) — direct retrieval unavailable; history confirmed via company website and trade press
notes: Input address listed Vista, CA — that appears to be a data error in source file. Correct HQ is Menomonee Falls/West Bend, WI. SAFER record clearly matches WI carrier per name and state. Note: a separate 'Johnson Bus Service LLC' (USDOT 65214) and 'Johnson Bus Service' (USDOT 934289) exist but are different entities. Sold to Landmark Student Transportation per Washington County Insider / School Bus Fleet reporting.

name: Riteway Bus Svc
fmcsa_address: 6970 S 6 St, Oak Creek, WI 53154 (Random Lake 720 Wolf Rd is a terminal location)
inc_date: 1957 (founded; exact WI DFI corporate registration date not retrieved)
officers: Rollie Bast and Pearl Bast (founders); now third-generation family management
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI Corporate Records (apps.dfi.wi.gov) — direct retrieval unavailable; founding date confirmed via Wikipedia and GO Riteway corporate site
notes: DBA 'GO Riteway Transportation Group' as of July 2011. Fleet of ~1,300 vehicles per Wikipedia (FMCSA shows 1,430 power units — higher figure likely includes all vehicle types). Safety rating from 12/20/2023. MCS-150 dated 02/11/2026. 155 inspections in last 24 months; 1 fatal/7 injury/24 tow-away crashes. Random Lake 720 Wolf Rd is one of 25+ Midwest terminals.

name: Dee Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Intrastate, private passenger (business); FMCSA common authority registered 06/01/1974
inc_date: 05/16/1989 (MA Secretary of State, Domestic Profit Corporation)
officers: Dee family (Leo Dee founded original taxi-cab operation 1946; George Dee expanded into school bus contracts)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth, Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us)
notes: Input HQ Pepperell (11 South Rd) is a terminal; SAFER physical address and SOS registered office are Shirley, MA. Company history (Leo Dee 1946 taxi -> George Dee school bus contracts -> 200 buses + 46 special-needs vans) predates 1989 MA SOS incorporation of current entity 'Dee Bus Service Inc'. Serves Ayer/Shirley, Groton/Dunstable, Westford, Nashoba Valley Tech, Clinton, Harvard, Littleton, Maynard, Tyngsboro, Lunenburg, North Middlesex (Ashby/Pepperell/Townsend), Montachusett RVTHS. SAFER reports 370 power units / 370 drivers; third-party CarrierNetwork cites 354 trucks/230 drivers — slight variance, MCS-150 self-reported numbers (dated 05/12/2026) take precedence.
